_meta._note: BIA's declarative-gen-ui agent runs a two-call sequence per pill: the outer agent emits generate_a2ui, the tool body invokes a secondary JSON LLM to produce the flat A2UI catalog, then the outer agent narrates after the tool result. Follow-up narrations are keyed by toolCallId and ordered before userMessage fixtures because aimock's hasToolResult check is thread-global; in multi-pill sessions a previous tool result must not make a new pill skip its generate_a2ui leg.

fixtures._comment: KPI dashboard follow-up after generate_a2ui returns.

response.content: KPI dashboard rendered with revenue, signups, and churn metrics.

fixtures._comment: KPI dashboard outer agent emits generate_a2ui with a brief.

toolCalls.name: generate_a2ui
toolCalls.arguments: {"brief":"KPI dashboard with revenue, signups, and churn metrics for the last 30 days"}

fixtures._comment: KPI dashboard secondary LLM emits flat A2UI catalog.

match.userMessage: KPI dashboard with revenue, signups, and churn metrics

fixtures._comment: Pie chart follow-up after generate_a2ui returns.

response.content: Pie chart rendered showing sales distribution across North America, Europe, and Asia Pacific.

fixtures._comment: Pie chart outer agent emits generate_a2ui with a brief.

match.userMessage: pie chart of sales by region

toolCalls.name: generate_a2ui
toolCalls.arguments: {"brief":"pie chart showing sales by region across North America, Europe, and Asia Pacific"}

fixtures._comment: Pie chart secondary LLM emits flat A2UI catalog.

match.userMessage: pie chart showing sales by region

response.content: {"surfaceId":"sales-pie","catalogId":"declarative-gen-ui-catalog","components":[{"id":"root","component":"PieChart","title":"Sales by Region","description":"Q4 - share of total revenue","data":[{"label":"North America","value":45},{"label":"Europe","value":30},{"label":"Asia Pacific","value":25}]}],"data":{}}

fixtures._comment: Bar chart outer agent emits generate_a2ui with a brief.

toolCalls.name: generate_a2ui
toolCalls.arguments: {"brief":"vertical bar chart comparing quarterly revenue for Q1 through Q4"}

fixtures._comment: Bar chart secondary LLM emits flat A2UI catalog.

match.userMessage: vertical bar chart comparing quarterly revenue
